change: deep-read.md promoted from retroactive-placeholder to substantive
detail: Prior deep-read.md was a one-line 'Generated retroactively. Re-analyze source for full Deep Read.' placeholder. Re-analysis writes a full structural map with 5 key-knowledge sections, editorial patterns, absence signals, and strongest/weakest aspects.

note: Prior pass (site mode, 5 pages) produced 4 strong candidates. Re-analysis in page mode would produce fewer/weaker candidates due to narrower coverage. Preserved prior candidate set rather than downgrade.
Prior creator-view.md is substantive (68/100 personal-fit, 'active-sprint' classification). Re-analysis in page mode would not improve it; preserved as-is.
Prior findings survive; page-mode re-analysis does not invalidate them.
4 candidates preserved from prior site-mode pass.
